calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Mar-19-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Emma Pendergrass appeared by telephone for Petitioner.

This matter was previously pre-granted but an appearance was made at the last hearing objecting to the petition. The matter was continued to allow filing of an objection. No appearance was made by any Party or Interested Person and nothing has been filed. The Court granted the accounting petition (order signed).

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Feb-09-2012 Continued To Mar-19-12 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Feb-06-2012 Continued To Feb-27-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Andrew Brown (Beneficary).

Mr. Brown appeared in Court to object to the pre-granting of First Account and Final Account, Report, etc. The First Account, etc. was continued to February 27, 2012 at 9:00 a.m.., in Dept. 204 for status of filing written objections to the First and Final Account. If written objection is not filed and served on cousel by that date, the Court will proceed with the petition.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy J. Gomez.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Dec-12-2011 Continued To Feb-06-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Nov-21-2011 Continued To Dec-12-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Nov-30-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Emma Pendergrass for and with Anthony Brown.

The Court stated that no opposition was filed. Ms. Pendergrass stated that Anthony Brown opened all of the books to his Brother Andrew. The Court granted the petition (signing the order for the same in open court). No bond is required.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Sep-29-2010 Continued To Nov-30-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Emma Pendergrass for and with Anthony Brown. Andrew Brown (Son) in Propria Persona.

Andrew Brown requested more time to obtain Counsel, stated that his Brother previously represented him but that there was dispute as to the percentages, that he was not contesting the will and asked for a complete accounting. Ms. Pendergrass had no objection to a continuance, explained that the estate had three categories (probate, trust, annuity) and stated that Andrew was not understanding how it was to be distributed. The matter was continued to November 30, 2010 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy K. Sandberg.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Aug-25-2010 Continued To Sep-29-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Frederick Brown (Son) in Propria Persona. Andrew Brown (Son) in Propria Persona. Alex Brown (Grandson) in Propria Persona. Tyrell Brown (Grandson) in Propria Persona.

This was a pre-granted matter. Mr. Brown stated that he was objecting to the manner of service of notice and that he had concerns about Anthony Brown being appointed as it was unclear if Anthony ever funded the Trust or fulfilled his responsibilities as Trustee. The matter was continued to September 29, 2010 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court advised the Parties to seek Counsel.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.
